title: Mercado Libre
description: ***.com.ar zoominfo.com/c/mercadolibre-srl/425378760 Argentine platform of MercadoLibre, the undisputed leader in Latin American e-commerce and fintech, founded in 1999 by Marcos Galperin. It operates a massive online marketplace integrated with a powerful ecosystem of services, including Mercado Pago for digital payments and Mercado Envíos for logistics. As a cornerstone of Argentina's digital economy, it connects millions of buyers and sellers, driving both retail innovation and financial inclusion across the nation
